title: eurya glabra
intro: Eurya glabra, also known as the Naked Eurya or Naked Euodia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euryaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Eurya glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
